metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop professional-level musical theatre skills through performance in substantial productions. This course emphasizes technical excellence across disciplines, artistic maturity, and preparation for musical theatre careers.
metadata.general_description: Advanced musical theatre course for professional-level performance and production.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced musical theatre performers demonstrate professional-level excellence across acting, singing, and dancing.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 performers integrate multiple disciplines seamlessly, executing demanding material with technical precision and artistic maturity.

big_ideas.statement: Professional musical theatre requires artistic leadership and collaborative excellence.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced performers mentor others, contribute to ensemble development, and take responsibility for artistic standards.

big_ideas.statement: Mature musical theatre performance combines technical skill with emotional authenticity and character depth.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 performers execute complex choreography and vocal demands while maintaining genuine emotional connection and character integrity.

big_ideas.statement: Professional musical theatre practice prepares students for careers in musical theatre or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional skills, portfolios, and networks necessary for musical theatre careers or continued education.

competencies.raw: Perform demanding musical theatre roles at professional level
i_can_statements: I can execute technically sophisticated and vocally demanding roles
I can perform with artistic maturity and emotional authenticity
I can maintain character throughout singing and dancing
I can demonstrate professional performance standards

competencies.raw: Integrate singing, dancing, and acting at professional level
i_can_statements: I can execute all disciplines simultaneously with mastery
I can transition seamlessly between singing, dancing, and speaking
I can maintain performance quality across extended scenes
I can execute complex musical theatre choreography

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated character work in musical theatre
i_can_statements: I can analyze and develop complex musical theatre characters
I can sustain character authentically across multiple scenes
I can use music and lyrics to deepen character development
I can find emotional truth within technical demands

competencies.raw: Take leadership roles within musical theatre productions
i_can_statements: I can take on leading roles with artistic authority
I can support ensemble development and growth
I can model professional standards and conduct
I can mentor less experienced performers

competencies.raw: Analyze musical theatre texts with sophistication
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed analysis of scripts and songs
I can understand character arcs and dramatic function
I can interpret lyrics for nuanced meaning
I can evaluate artistic choices in musical theatre
I can articulate professional standards in musical theatre
I can understand industry and career pathways
I can recognize excellence in professional productions
I can evaluate professional musical theatre work

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and professional readiness
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my development as a musical theatre performer
I can assess my readiness for professional musical theatre
I can articulate my artistic strengths and vision
I can envision musical theatre as potential career

competencies.raw: Engage with musical theatre history and diverse traditions
i_can_statements: I can understand musical theatre history and evolution
I can appreciate diverse musical theatre traditions
I can recognize representation in musical theatre
I can understand musical theatre's cultural role

competencies.raw: Perform with professional presence and artistry
i_can_statements: I can perform with full artistic commitment and presence
I can engage audiences emotionally and intellectually
I can maintain consistent performance quality
I can adapt to varying performance contexts

competencies.raw: Lead rehearsal and communication with artistic teams
i_can_statements: I can communicate effectively with directors and choreographers
I can collaborate professionally with ensemble members
I can take responsibility for artistic quality
I can contribute to positive company culture
I can represent company with professionalism and pride
I can participate effectively in audience engagement
I can discuss work meaningfully with audiences
I can contribute to company's public reputation
I can create meaningful performance experiences
I can connect audiences to musical theatre stories
I can express emotional truth through performance
I can develop distinctive artistic presence

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse musical theatre traditions and forms
i_can_statements: I can perform in diverse musical theatre traditions
I can appreciate non-Western musical theatre forms
I can respectfully engage with culturally specific work
I can understand global musical theatre practices

competencies.raw: Explore emerging musical theatre practices and innovation
i_can_statements: I can engage with contemporary musical theatre
I can participate in innovative and experimental work
I can contribute to evolution of musical theatre
I can develop work at frontier of form
I can build professional networks in musical theatre
I can create professional materials and recordings
I can establish professional presence
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional musical theatre career
i_can_statements: I can identify musical theatre career goals
I can develop plan for professional advancement
I can explore diverse musical theatre career paths
I can commit to professional development and growth

areas.name: Professional Musical Theatre Performance
topics: Advanced character development and emotional authenticity
Performance in diverse musical theatre styles

areas.name: Advanced Musical Theatre Skill Integration
topics: Seamless integration of acting, singing, and dancing
Managing technical demands while maintaining character
Vocal health and stamina for demanding roles
Coordination of complex movements with singing
Flexibility across various musical theatre styles

areas.name: Character Development and Artistic Interpretation
topics: Collaboration with directors on character choices
Playing in ensemble while developing complex character
Bringing personal artistry to established material

areas.name: Professional Musical Theatre Practice and Career
areas.raw: Professional Musical Theatre Practice and Career
topics: Understanding musical theatre careers and opportunities
